attributes.__structure__:
ATTRS:
  description: Amateur meteo station data.
  VERSION: 0.0.0
COORDS:
  date_time:
    name: date_time
    coords:
    - date_time
    unit:
      tick: h
      tz: UTC
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    type: datetime64[h]
    na_value: null
    description: Time coordinate
    df_col: timestamp
    source_unit:
      tick: s
      tz: CET
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    range: null
    composed:
    - date_time
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits:
    - 1
    - 12
    - hour
    sorted: None
  depth_level:
    name: depth_level
    coords:
    - depth_level
    unit: null
    type: null
    description: Depth index form top to bottom.
    df_col: depth_level
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - depth_level
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: true
  meteo_station_id:
    name: meteo_station_id
    coords:
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: null
    type: null
    df_col: meteo_station_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - meteo_station_id
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: true
VARS:
  meteo_T:
    name: meteo_T
    coords:
    - date_time
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Meteo station. Air temperature.
    df_col: meteo_T
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  meteo_moisture:
    name: meteo_moisture
    coords:
    - date_time
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Meteo station. Air temperature.
    df_col: meteo_moisture
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  meteo_percipitation:
    name: meteo_percipitation
    coords:
    - date_time
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Meteo station. Air temperature.
    df_col: meteo_percipitation
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  meteo_wind_velocity:
    name: meteo_wind_velocity
    coords:
    - date_time
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Meteo station. Air temperature.
    df_col: meteo_wind_velocity
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  meteo_radiation:
    name: meteo_radiation
    coords:
    - date_time
    - meteo_station_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Meteo station. Air temperature.
    df_col: meteo_radiation
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
